hero.title: Hi, I'm Hernan Vasquez
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.paragraph: I am passionate about solving business problems through technology. I enjoy analyzing processes, designing scalable solutions, and building software that helps organizations improve efficiency, automate workflows, and achieve their goals.

about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I like understanding problems before writing code. I enjoy building clear and well-structured solutions where every decision makes sense technically and functionally.
about.paragraph2: I have worked on web applications using Java, Spring Boot, React and Node.js. I focus on writing maintainable code, applying best practices, and improving continuously with each project.
about.paragraph3: I am looking to keep growing as a FullStack developer while delivering solutions that make a real impact.

skills.title: Skills
skills.softDeck: Discover how I work through these cards

easypos.title: EasyPOS
easypos.description: Offline-first mobile POS app focused on accessibility for older adults and small businesses.

prescription.title: Prescription Platform
prescription.description: Full stack system built with Next.js and NestJS using TypeScript end-to-end and deployed to production.

lawyer.title: Lawyer Landing Page
lawyer.description: Corporate website built with Astro and TypeScript focused on performance, accessibility and SEO.

coroto.title: Coroto Marketplace
coroto.description: Marketplace for certified refurbished hardware and electronics. Led the technical direction, product planning and team coordination while working with Agile methodologies. Built a complete platform featuring JWT authentication, payment integration, product recommendation chatbot and a customer experience designed to increase trust in second-hand technology purchases.

bullets: End-to-end web solutions for clients and independent projects, from requirements to production.
Requirements analysis, technical problem solving and scalable software construction.
Building modern interfaces with React and integrating REST APIs focused on UX and performance.
Developed web and mobile applications with React, React Native, Node.js and TypeScript.
Built scalable APIs with Express and NestJS under modular architecture.
Implemented SQL/NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
Used ORMs, authentication, logging (Morgan) and external API consumption.
Worked under agile methodologies (Scrum) in collaborative development teams.
Business process analysis and requirements gathering with users from different areas.
Design and development of an internal ERP to centralize operations and improve traceability.
Backend development with NestJS, TypeScript and PostgreSQL under a modular architecture and REST APIs.
Frontend development with React, TypeScript and PrimeReact for managing internal processes.
Automation of operational flows, optimizing management times and reducing manual tasks.
Designed interactive Power BI dashboards to monitor business indicators and support decision-making.
Automated analysis and transformation processes using Python and Pandas.
Migrated and structured data from Excel to PostgreSQL to centralize and optimize access.
Implemented customer segmentation and profiling based on historical purchasing patterns.
Generated strategic reports and forecasting models to support sales and opportunity tracking.
Foundations of software engineering, databases, networks and system architecture.
Logical and structured problem solving applied to computational problems.
Intensive Full Stack training with Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs and modern backend architecture.
Built complete web applications with frontend in JavaScript and Bootstrap and backend in Java with Spring Boot.
Focused on best practices, teamwork, agile methodologies and real work environment simulation.
Solved real problems through practical projects and weekly deliverables.
Foundations in technical support, equipment maintenance and computer networks.
Introduction to programming and technical problem solving.
Hands-on training that strengthened the transition to software development.

footer.heading: Do you have a project or technical challenge?
footer.paragraph: I specialize in analyzing complex problems, designing scalable solutions and building robust applications focused on performance, maintainability and UX.
footer.name: Hernan Jose Vasquez Araujo
